name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium noise-canceling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life, deep bass, and crystal-clear audio. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

name: Smart Fitness Watch
description: Track your health with heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, GPS, and 100+ workout modes. Water-resistant up to 50m.

name: Vintage Leather Backpack
description: Handcrafted genuine leather backpack with laptop compartment. Perfect for work, travel, or daily use. Fits 15-inch laptops.

name: Organic Green Tea Set
description: Premium Japanese green tea collection with traditional ceramic teapot and 4 cups. Includes 5 varieties of loose leaf tea.

name: Professional DSLR Camera
description: 24.2MP full-frame sensor with 4K video recording. Includes 18-55mm kit lens. Perfect for photography enthusiasts.

name: Minimalist Desk Lamp
description: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness, color temperature control, and USB charging port. Eye-care technology.

name: Running Shoes Pro
description: Lightweight performance running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Available in multiple colors.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 24hrs or hot 12hrs. BPA-free, eco-friendly design.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Fast 15W wireless charger compatible with all Qi-enabled devices. Sleek design with LED indicator.

name: Premium Yoga Mat
description: Extra thick 6mm eco-friendly yoga mat with alignment lines. Non-slip surface, includes carrying strap.

name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
description: Timeless aviator design with polarized lenses and metal frame. UV400 protection. Includes premium case.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches. Programmable keys and dedicated media controls.
